case_title: EDWARD G. CORVI VS. JOSEPH ARANDA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,425.00 FILED BY CORVI, EDWARD G. AS TO DEFENDANT ARANDA, JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER THE REQUEST OF THE DEFENDANT
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY CORVI, EDWARD G.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-06-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-06-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH. PLAINTIFF EDWARD G. CORVI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSEPH ARANDA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $175. SERVED OCT-06-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ARANDA, JOSEPH

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-06-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF EDWARD G. CORVI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSEPH ARANDA IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. THE DEFENDANT LEFT A VOICEMAIL MESSAGE WITH THE CIVIL CLERK'S OFFICE THIS MORNING STATING THAT HE IS SICK AND CANNOT APPEAR TODAY. THE COURT GRANTS THE DEFENDANT A TWO-WEEK CONTINUANCE. THIS MATTER IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 6, 2023 AT 8:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 506. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORVI, EDWARD G. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARANDA, JOSEPH $3,425.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,625.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORVI, EDWARD G. AS TO DEFENDANT ARANDA, JOSEPH
